sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51347" key="i)sxuroka/rdios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰσχῡρο-κάρδιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n51347.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">gloss on </lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τλήθυμος</ref></xr>, Id.</sense> </entryFree>
